name: Chocolate Zucchini Cake
recipeInstructions:
Sift together the flour, cocoa powder, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon. Cream the butter until smooth. Gradually add the sugar, beating until fluffy. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Alternate adding the sifted dry ingredients with buttermilk, stirring to combine. Stir in vanilla extract, orange peel, zucchini, and nuts. Pour the batter into a greased 10-inch tube pan and bake at 350°F for one hour. Turn off the heat source and let cool on a rack for 15 minutes before glazing.
GLAZE: Beat together powdered sugar, fresh orange juice, orange peel, and melted butter until smooth.
